hero.subtitle: Welcome to My Kitchen
hero.title: Chef J Test
hero.tagline: Crafting culinary masterpieces with passion, creativity, and the finest ingredients

about.name: MR.John
about.bio: With 0 years of experience in Michelin-starred restaurants across Europe, I bring a unique blend of traditional Italian techniques and modern culinary innovation to every dish I create.
about.philosophy: My philosophy is simple: respect the ingredients. I source only the finest local and seasonal produce, allowing the natural flavors to shine through in every creation.

dishes.title: Black Truffle Risotto
dishes.description: Carnaroli rice cooked in rich bone broth with fresh black truffle and Parmigiano-Reggiano

dishes.title: Pan-Seared Scallops
dishes.description: With cauliflower puree, pancetta crisps, and micro herbs

dishes.title: Grand Marnier Soufflé
dishes.description: Light chocolate soufflé with orange zest and crème anglaise

dishes.title: Herb-Crusted Rack of Lamb
dishes.description: With roasted baby vegetables and red wine reduction

experience.title: Executive Chef
experience.subtitle: La Belle Époque • Paris
experience.description: Leading a team of 15 chefs in a 2-Michelin-star restaurant. Introduced seasonal tasting menus that increased reservations by 40%.

experience.title: Sous Chef
experience.subtitle: Ristorante Arte • Milan
experience.description: Managed kitchen operations and developed new menu items. Awarded "Best New Restaurant in Lombardy" in 2019.

experience.title: Chef de Partie
experience.subtitle: The Savoy • London
experience.description: Specialized in pastry and dessert creation. Contributed to the restaurant's Michelin star retention.

experience.title: Culinary Award
experience.subtitle: "Golden Toque" International Culinary Competition
experience.description: First place in the international culinary competition with my signature truffle risotto dish.

testimonials.text: Chef Rossi's culinary artistry transformed our wedding reception into an unforgettable experience. Every dish was a masterpiece.
testimonials.author: Sophia Laurent

testimonials.text: Working with Marco elevated our restaurant to new heights. His innovative approach while respecting traditions is remarkable.
testimonials.author: Antoine Dubois

testimonials.text: The tasting menu curated by Chef Rossi was the most exquisite dining experience of my life. Each course told a story.
testimonials.author: James Wilson

footer.tagline: Crafting culinary excellence with passion and precision
